privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic test task for modifying Jitsi Meet configuration using Docker containers (version stable-9753). The task requires restricting the toolbar to exactly four buttons: microphone, camera, chat, and hangup. The configuration is stored in /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js. A critical logical inconsistency exists: 'hangup' appears in both the required_buttons and forbidden_buttons lists, though the verifier explicitly handles this as intentional 'trap/check logic'. All button identifiers are valid Jitsi Meet toolbar button names except 'shareaudio' which could not be confirmed as an official standalone toolbar button identifier. The test meeting URL is http://localhost:8080/YogaClass.
